metadata.title: DriftReport — manifest vs code drift report

description: A structured report of the drift between manifest declarations and live code (src/shared/models/drift_models.py). Single-class file. mismatched_mappings uses bare list[dict] (no type parameterization) — the same minor annotation gap as FlowStep.params and DriftReport.mismatched_mappings; low priority, independent of ADR-056. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

missing_in_code.description: Identifiers declared in the manifest but absent from live code.

undeclared_in_manifest.description: Identifiers present in live code but not declared in the manifest.

mismatched_mappings.description: Mapping entries where manifest and code declarations conflict. Typed as list[dict] (bare dict, no type parameterization — minor annotation gap).
